common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to Voxium

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication
totp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
totp.backupCodeHint: You can also use a backup code

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
resetPassword.failedToReset: Failed to reset password. The link may be invalid or expired.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been verified successfully!
verifyEmail.failed: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.

emailPending.title: Verify your email
emailPending.description: We sent a verification link to <1>{{email}}</1>. Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
emailPending.sent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
emailPending.checkSpam: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try resending.

security.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least {{min}} characters.
security.twoFactorEnabled: Two-factor authentication is currently enabled. You will be asked for a verification code each time you sign in.
security.twoFactorDisabled: Add an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a verification code from an authenticator app when you sign in.
security.scanQRCode: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
security.cantScan: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
security.enterCodeToDisable: Enter a verification code from your authenticator app or a backup code to disable two-factor authentication.
security.backupCodesDescription: These codes can be used to access your account if you lose your authenticator device. Each code can only be used once. Store them somewhere safe.
security.failedToCopyBackup: Unable to copy backup codes to clipboard

appearance.builtInThemesDesc: Choose how Voxium looks to you
appearance.customThemesDesc: Create, import, or browse community themes
appearance.noCustomThemes: No custom themes yet. Create one, browse the marketplace, or import a JSON file.

audio.noiseSuppressionDesc: ML-powered filter (RNNoise) removes keyboard, mouse, and background noise
audio.voiceQualityNote: Higher quality uses more bandwidth. Takes effect on next voice join.
audio.holdToTransmit: Hold this key to transmit audio
audio.micSensitivityDesc: Filters background noise (keyboard, mouse). Move right to filter more.
audio.notificationSoundsDesc: Play sounds for voice join/leave and new messages
audio.desktopNotificationsDesc: Show Windows notifications for messages and voice events

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the Voxium interface.

general.invitesLocked: Invites are locked. No one can create or use invite links.
general.invitesOpen: Invites are open. Members can create and share invite links.
general.deleteWarning: Deleting a server is permanent and cannot be undone. All channels, messages, and members will be removed.

members.kickDescription: They will be removed from the server and will need a new invite to rejoin.
members.transferDescription: You will lose owner privileges and become an admin. This cannot be undone by you.

limits.description: Resource limits for this server. These are configured by platform administrators.
limits.maxChannelsDesc: Maximum text + voice channels in this server
limits.maxVoiceUsersDesc: Maximum users that can join a single voice channel
limits.maxCategoriesDesc: Maximum channel categories in this server
limits.maxMembersDesc: Maximum members that can join this server

VIEW_CHANNEL.name: View Channels
VIEW_CHANNEL.description: Allows members to view text and voice channels

MANAGE_CHANNELS.name: Manage Channels
MANAGE_CHANNELS.description: Allows members to create, edit, and delete channels

MANAGE_CATEGORIES.name: Manage Categories
MANAGE_CATEGORIES.description: Allows members to create, edit, and delete categories

MANAGE_SERVER.name: Manage Server
MANAGE_SERVER.description: Allows members to edit server name, icon, and settings

MANAGE_ROLES.name: Manage Roles
MANAGE_ROLES.description: Allows members to create, edit, and delete roles below their own

CREATE_INVITES.name: Create Invites
CREATE_INVITES.description: Allows members to create server invite links

KICK_MEMBERS.name: Kick Members
KICK_MEMBERS.description: Allows members to kick other members with lower roles

MANAGE_NICKNAMES.name: Manage Nicknames
MANAGE_NICKNAMES.description: Allows members to change other members' display names

CHANGE_NICKNAME.name: Change Nickname
CHANGE_NICKNAME.description: Allows members to change their own display name

SEND_MESSAGES.name: Send Messages
SEND_MESSAGES.description: Allows members to send messages in text channels

MANAGE_MESSAGES.name: Manage Messages
MANAGE_MESSAGES.description: Allows members to delete messages from other members

ATTACH_FILES.name: Attach Files
ATTACH_FILES.description: Allows members to upload file attachments

ADD_REACTIONS.name: Add Reactions
ADD_REACTIONS.description: Allows members to add reactions to messages

CONNECT.name: Connect
CONNECT.description: Allows members to join voice channels

SPEAK.name: Speak
SPEAK.description: Allows members to speak in voice channels

MUTE_MEMBERS.name: Mute Members
MUTE_MEMBERS.description: Allows members to mute other members in voice

DEAFEN_MEMBERS.name: Deafen Members
DEAFEN_MEMBERS.description: Allows members to deafen other members in voice

MOVE_MEMBERS.name: Move Members
MOVE_MEMBERS.description: Allows members to move other members between voice channels

ADMINISTRATOR.name: Administrator
ADMINISTRATOR.description: Grants all permissions and bypasses all channel overrides

channelPermissions.title: Channel Permissions
channelPermissions.description: Configure channel-specific permission overrides for this role. Overrides take priority over role permissions.
channelPermissions.selectRole: Select a role to configure permissions

messageItem.editHint: escape to cancel · enter to save

create.inviteCodePlaceholder: Enter an invite code or link
create.iconUploadFailed: Server created but icon upload failed

chat.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone.

report.description: Select a category and describe the issue. Reports are reviewed by our staff.
report.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail (min {{min}} characters)...
report.reasonMinLength: Reason must be at least {{min}} characters

chat.selectChannel: Select a text channel to start chatting
chat.waitForUploads: Please wait for uploads to finish

dm.title: Direct Messages
dm.confirmSupport: This will open a support ticket. Continue?
dm.conversationStart: This is the start of your direct message history.
dm.welcomeMessage: Select a conversation from the sidebar, or click on a member in any server to start a new one.

friends.title: Friends
friends.noOnline: No friends are online right now.
friends.noFriends: You don't have any friends yet. Try sending a friend request!

addFriend.title: Add Friend
addFriend.description: You can add friends with their Voxium username.

voice.serverDeafenedAndMuted: You are server deafened and muted
voice.moderatorRestricted: A moderator has restricted your audio

support.title: Support
support.noMessages: No messages yet. Send a message to get help from our staff.

hero.subtitle: The open, privacy-first voice and text platform for communities that value freedom and transparency.

stats.title: Growing Together
stats.subtitle: Real numbers from the Voxium community — updated live.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Voice, text, and community — all in one place, with no compromises on privacy or performance.
features.voiceDesc: SFU-powered server voice for 25+ users per channel. DM calls go direct peer-to-peer — no middleman.
features.noiseSuppressionDesc: ML-powered RNNoise filter removes keyboard, mouse, and background noise in real time — so only your voice comes through.
features.messagingDesc: Instant delivery, reactions, typing indicators, and direct messages — all in real time.
features.privacyDesc: No ads, no tracking, no data harvesting. Your conversations stay yours.
features.serversDesc: Create servers, organize channels, invite friends — everything you need to build a community.
features.callsDesc: 1-on-1 voice calls with WebRTC peer-to-peer. Crystal clear, zero latency.
features.fastDesc: Built with React 19, Vite, and Redis-backed presence. Snappy on any hardware.

comparison.title: How Voxium compares
comparison.subtitle: See how Voxium stacks up against the alternatives. We believe communication software should be open, private, and community-owned.
comparison.footnote: Comparison based on free tiers as of March 2026. Features marked "Planned" are on the roadmap.

showcase.title: Made
showcase.subtitle: Customize every detail — from colors to languages to who can do what.

why.title: Why Voxium?
why.ownDataDesc: Self-host or use our servers — either way, your data belongs to you. No mining, no selling.
why.openSourceDesc: Every line of code is public. Audit it, fork it, contribute to it. Full transparency.
why.communityDrivenDesc: Built by the community, for the community. Features are shaped by the people who use them.

funding.title: Funded by the Community
funding.subtitle: No ads. No data harvesting. No strings attached. Voxium is funded entirely by the people who use it.
funding.supporterBadge: Supporters get a special in-app badge to show their contribution

cta.title: Ready to experience communication, reimagined?
cta.subtitle: Join the open communication revolution. No credit card. No subscription.

footer.tagline: Open, privacy-first voice and text communication.

badges.firstSupporterTooltip: First Supporter — The very first to believe in Voxium
badges.topSupporterTooltip: Top Supporter — The most generous supporter of Voxium

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. You can try to recover or reload the page.

serverErrors.usernameOrEmailTaken: Username or email already in use
serverErrors.totpSetupRequired: Please set up two-factor authentication first
serverErrors.alreadyMember: Already a member of this server
serverErrors.notAMember: Not a member of this server
serverErrors.noPermissionManageChannels: You do not have permission to manage channels
serverErrors.cannotSendToVoice: Cannot send messages to a voice channel
serverErrors.invalidChannelType: Channel type must be text or voice
serverErrors.noPermissionManageCategories: You do not have permission to manage categories
serverErrors.noPermissionManageRoles: You do not have permission to manage roles
serverErrors.cannotGrantPermissions: Cannot grant permissions you do not have
serverErrors.cannotEditHigherRole: Cannot edit a role at or above your own position
serverErrors.cannotDeleteHigherRole: Cannot delete a role at or above your own position
serverErrors.roleNameExists: A role with this name already exists
serverErrors.canOnlyEditOwnMessages: You can only edit your own messages
serverErrors.noPermissionSendMessages: You do not have permission to send messages in this channel
serverErrors.noPermissionAttachFiles: You do not have permission to attach files in this channel
serverErrors.noPermissionAddReactions: You do not have permission to add reactions in this channel
serverErrors.noPermissionViewChannel: You do not have permission to view this channel
serverErrors.notAParticipant: Not a participant of this conversation
serverErrors.notServerMember: You are not a member of this server
serverErrors.noPermissionJoinVoice: You do not have permission to join this voice channel
serverErrors.voiceServerUnavailable: Voice server unavailable. Please try again later.
serverErrors.noPermissionMuteMembers: You do not have permission to mute members
serverErrors.cannotMuteHigherRole: Cannot mute a member with an equal or higher role
serverErrors.noPermissionDeafenMembers: You do not have permission to deafen members
serverErrors.cannotDeafenHigherRole: Cannot deafen a member with an equal or higher role
serverErrors.noPermissionMoveMembers: You do not have permission to move members
serverErrors.cannotMoveHigherRole: Cannot move a member with an equal or higher role
serverErrors.userNotInVoice: User is not in a voice channel
serverErrors.targetNoPermissionJoinVoice: Target user does not have permission to join that channel
serverErrors.cannotFriendSelf: Cannot send friend request to yourself
serverErrors.onlyAddresseeCanAccept: Only the addressee can accept a friend request
serverErrors.invitesLocked: Invites are locked for this server
serverErrors.noPermissionCreateInvites: You do not have permission to create invites
serverErrors.alreadyMemberInvite: You are already a member of this server
serverErrors.noPermissionChangeIcon: You do not have permission to change the server icon
serverErrors.reportAlreadyPending: You already have a pending report against this target
serverErrors.ticketClosed: Ticket is closed. Reopen it to send messages.
serverErrors.onlySuperAdminCanBan: Only super admins can ban other admins
